context: A pivotal moment in this group stage match. Tunisia trail Australia 0-1. Something has to change. The manager must decide how to respond.

options.label: A
options.action: Double substitution — inject fresh legs into attack and midfield

options.label: B
options.action: Switch to a back 3, push full-backs forward for overloads

options.label: C
options.action: Hold shape, trust the system, make changes at 75th minute

options.label: D
options.action: Triple substitution — all-out attacking change, gamble everything

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Double substitution — inject fresh legs into attack and midfield**
Risk level: High. This is the proactive choice. Fresh legs can exploit tiring defenders and create new attacking patterns. In the context of this group stage match between Tunisia and Australia (0-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Switch to a back 3, push full-backs forward for overloads**
Risk level: Medium. This is the structural change. A back 3 gives more attacking width but requires the midfield to cover more ground. In the context of this group stage match between Tunisia and Australia (0-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Hold shape, trust the system, make changes at 75th minute**
Risk level: Medium. This is the patient approach. Trusting the system avoids panic but may waste precious time on the clock. In the context of this group stage match between Tunisia and Australia (0-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Triple substitution — all-out attacking change, gamble everything**
Risk level: Very High. This is the desperate gamble. Maximum attacking intent but leaves the team dangerously exposed to counter-attacks. In the context of this group stage match between Tunisia and Australia (0-1), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.

replay_events.description: Mitchell Thomas Duke scores for Australia!
Aïssa Bilal Laïdouni (Tunisia) shown a yellow card card — Foul
Jamie MacLaren replaces Mitchell Thomas Duke (Tactical)
Ali Abdi (Tunisia) shown a yellow card card — Foul
Wahbi Khazri replaces Aïssa Bilal Laïdouni (Tactical)
Taha Yassine Khenissi replaces Issam Jebali (Tactical)
Wajdi Kechrida replaces Dylan Daniel Mahmoud Bronn (Tactical)
Awer Denis Bul Mabil replaces Craig Goodwin (Tactical)
Ferjani Sassi (Tunisia) shown a yellow card card — Foul
